programmes.show_description: A celebration of Naked Attraction's very best naughty bits, revisiting the good, the bad and the kinky, from a polyamorous couple and a three-time picker to food fetishes and whipped cream.
Brand new series: The experiment intensifies. Gia considers taking a big step after years of celibacy, while tensions explode in Fiji for Bec and Danny.
This time, the Goggleboxers watch In with a Shout, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Rise and Fall, Saving Our Wild Isles, Last Woman on Earth, Obsession, and Dr. Down Below.
The Spencer's Gift: Erica is jealous of Barry's outstanding performance when they both get after-school jobs at Spencer's gift shop selling novelty presents.
So Swayze It's Crazy: When Adam tries his hand at acting, an agent decides he's only good for nerd roles, so Beverly sets out to turn him into a heartthrob.
The Kara-te Kid: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud for good.
Jai married Leanne - who's scared of heights - 100 feet in the air. Now it's his turn to squirm as he sits down with his bride and her dad to relive their nuptials. (Ep9)
The Wild: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jay's annual hiking trip to find an elusive bald eagle. And Gloria, Alex, Claire and Haley get together to plan a baby shower.
Stand by Your Man: Dylan and Luke are impressed by Bill's tales of heroism as a firefighter, which makes Phil feel emasculated. So he invites the guys over for male bonding.
A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.
La Frite: In Los Angeles, Gordon Ramsay visits La Frite, a French restaurant that's being run into the ground by its squabbling family owners.
Major League'd: Adam is terrified when he and his friends are recruited to the school baseball team. Geoff's father interferes in his relationship with Erica.
My Valentine Boy: Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey. Adam and Murray plot to escape from Valentine's Day dinner with Beverly.
The Prescott: Alex's new company puts her up at a luxury apartment with full amenities and famous neighbours - and the family are keen to make the most of it...
Legacy: Phil visits his dad to make sure he's OK after hearing some concerning news. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch a bunch of their old childhood memorabilia.
Waverly Hills, 9-0-2-1-D'oh: The family rent a flat in the affluent Waverly Hills area so that Bart and Lisa can get into a good school.
Four Great Women and a Manicure: On a visit to the nail salon, Marge and Lisa discuss whether a woman can be simultaneously clever, powerful and beautiful.
Coming to Homerica: When nearby Ogdenville's unemployed come to Springfield looking for jobs, Mayor Quimby shuts the town's borders and enlists private citizens to guard them.
Café Kingston: In California, Gordon visits Jamaican restaurant Café Kingston. He meets micromanaging owner Dr Una Morris, who's also a radiotherapist.
Capri: In Eagle Rock, California, Gordon helps Capri, a restaurant in a rut that's owned by identical twins Jim and Jeff and is closed more often than it's open.
I'm Goin' to Praiseland: Ned opens a Christian amusement park. At first, the tame religious attractions are unpopular. But then visitors start having visions...
Simpsons Tall Tales: A hobo regales the family with unique takes on classic American tales starring the Simpsons as Connie Appleseed, Paul Bunyan and Tom Sawyer.
Come Fly with Me: Jay reluctantly takes Phil out to fly his new model plane, but a manoeuvre goes awry...
The Incident: Claire and Mitchell's mother, Dede, drops in for a surprise visit and is determined to make amends with everyone who she offended during 'the incident'.
Waverly Hills, 9-0-2-1-D'oh: The family rent a flat in the affluent Waverly Hills area so that Bart and Lisa can get into a good school.
Four Great Women and a Manicure: On a visit to the nail salon, Marge and Lisa discuss whether a woman can be simultaneously clever, powerful and beautiful.
Coming to Homerica: When nearby Ogdenville's unemployed come to Springfield looking for jobs, Mayor Quimby shuts the town's borders and enlists private citizens to guard them.
It's the end of the first week and Brendan has a twist up his sleeve. The celebs tackle pottery in Porto, before an argument threatens to send one couple packing.
Kill Gil, Volumes I & II: The Simpsons are stuck with an unwanted house guest, Gil, at Christmas. And he stays for a whole year... until Marge throws him out on Christmas Eve.
The Wife Aquatic: The family visit Barnacle Bay, where Marge grew up, but discover that it's become run-down. Can Homer help to clean up the town?
The Wayz We Were: Evergreen Terrace becomes one giant traffic jam thanks to a new GPS app. Moe reunites with an old flame - and this time he's determined to not screw it up.
...Reunion Special: Brand new - Revelations and a fiery showdown are served as the class of 2025 reunite at an explosive dinner party.
Brand new series: MAFS Australia is back with a fresh batch of Aussie singles ready to wed sight unseen, starting with a jaw-dropping moment at the altar.
Brand new series: The weddings erupt into chaos when one groom forgets the rings, while bride Gia frets that a big secret could send her groom Scott running...
Brand new series: One couple are smitten on honeymoon. Another are very much not. And two new couples get hitched, including flashy English groom Danny.
Brand new series: The experiment intensifies. Gia considers taking a big step after years of celibacy, while tensions explode in Fiji for Bec and Danny.
Deadheads: Barry's friends reject him for being controlling after chilled rocker Matt starts hanging out with them. Beverly sets up a swear jar.
Baré: When Lainey wins a scholarship to a top art college, Barry considers modifying his dream of becoming a doctor to go with her.
In 2016, Ryan planned a wedding for his bride Maria in the school where they met. Now, Maria and her sister Veronica ask him some tricky questions about the big day. (Ep10)
Best of the Best: The teams are each given one of the five best challenges from previous seasons. And this time, they're not competing against each other...
Starry Night: Jay and Mitchell set out on their traditional father-son outing to see the meteor showers, but Mitchell is surprised to see that Manny will be joining them.
Davide: In Boston, Gordon Ramsay visits Davide, an Italian restaurant that's been run into the ground by brothers Frank and Anthony. Can they learn to trust each other again?
Zeke's: In New Orleans, Gordon Ramsay visits a restaurant famed for its Cajun food and loyal locals. But under new ownership, standards have slipped and the customers have left.
Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants that he helped - Lido, Anna Vincenzo's and Le Bistro. Have the owners put his advice to good use?
...Reunion Special: Brand new - Revelations and a fiery showdown are served as the class of 2025 reunite at an explosive dinner party.
Brand new series: MAFS Australia is back with a fresh batch of Aussie singles ready to wed sight unseen, starting with a jaw-dropping moment at the altar.
Brand new series: The weddings erupt into chaos when one groom forgets the rings, while bride Gia frets that a big secret could send her groom Scott running...
(1990) Action comedy with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A tough cop goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. Tough? Ha! The kids'll take him down in no time.
The Boy Who Knew Too Much: Bart is witness when Mayor Quimby's nephew is falsely accused of assaulting a French butler. But to testify, he has to admit to skipping school...
Lady Bouvier's Lover: Grampa and Mr Burns compete for the affections of Marge's mum.
The City of New York vs. Homer Simpson: Homer must pluck up the courage to return to New York after Barney leaves his car there on a drunken binge.
The Principal and the Pauper: The real Seymour Skinner (Martin Sheen) returns to Springfield, revealing that Principal Skinner is an impostor whose real name is Armin Tamzarian.
Simprovised: Homer turns to improvisational comedy to bolster his public speaking. Marge decides to upgrade Bart's tumbledown treehouse, but he questions her building skills.
Orange Is the New Yellow: Marge is arrested for neglect after letting Bart go to the park alone, but finds that prison gives her a break from the demands of family life.
The celebrity Goggleboxers, including Rylan and Mo Gilligan, watch MILF Manor, Under Paris, Bake Off: The Professionals, The Supervet, Countdown and The Motorway Hotel.
Britain's top armchair critics watch The Celebrity Traitors, Trigger Point, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Bake Off, Love Is Blind, DIY SOS and BBC News (clocks).
The Celebrity Traitors is on this time. There's Game of Wool: Britain's Best Knitter. And Trigger Point, Hunted, Squid Game: The Challenge and Hamza's Hidden Wild Isles.
